hooks.command: $d = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; $c = (git log -1 --pretty=format:'%s' 2>$null); if (-not $c) { $c = 'no commits yet' }; $con = Get-Content 'BUILD_LOG.md' -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $n = ([regex]::Matches($con, '## Task \d+').Count + 1); Add-Content 'BUILD_LOG.md' "`n## Task $n -- $c`n- Date: $d`n- Brief: (fill in)`n- What Claude proposed: see conversation`n- Verification: (fill in)"
